tender.description: Club work (1) Erection of AB cable for Extension of Power supply from Kalyanpur Dump Tola 440 V OH line to Pramukh Rina Kumari house, Near Kalyanpur Coal Dump under CHP-CPP, Piparwar. (2) Erection of pole, cradling wire, conductor, stay set and earth
